overview.description: The Innovator U.S. Equity Ultra Buffer ETF - March (UMAR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on the S&P 500 over a specific holdings period. The actively-managed fund holds options and collateral. UMAR was launched on Mar 2, 2020 and is issued by Innovator.
